summary: Frontend e2e testing of two new P1 features: (1) Products page search + grade filter pills, (2) Role-switch banner for 'both' role users on Seller & Buyer dashboards. All 19 targeted scenarios passed (12 Products page + 7 role-switch). Backend was already validated in iteration_6 (no backend changes for these features beyond seller_name on /api/products which still works).
passed_tests: Products page loads with search input + grade pills + 5 product cards
All Grades pill shows total count: 'All Grades (5)'
All 5 unique grades rendered as pills with per-grade counts (6 mm to 7 mm, 7 mm, 7 mm to 8 mm, 7 to 8 MM, 8 mm & Above each (1))
Seller name 'by Cardamom Spices Centre' shown on product cards
Clicking grade pill '7 mm to 8 mm' filters to 1 product
Filter summary shows 'Showing 1 of 5 products' when filter active
'Clear all filters' link resets to all 5 products
Search by name (case-insensitive) works ('PREMIUM' matches descriptions)
Search by seller name works (vignesh => 1 product)
Search by size works ('8 mm' => 3 matches)
Combined search ('Green') + grade ('8 mm & Above') => 1 product
Empty state /products-no-results shown for non-matching query
Search clear (X) button resets search and shows all 5
BOTH-role user on /seller sees role-switch-banner with switch-to-buyer-btn
BOTH-role user on /dashboard sees role-switch-banner with switch-to-seller-btn
BOTH-role user can navigate /seller -> /dashboard -> /seller via switch buttons
Pure SELLER role user does NOT see role-switch-banner on /seller
Pure SELLER role user blocked from /dashboard (redirected to /seller)
Pure BUYER role user does NOT see role-switch-banner on /dashboard
Pure BUYER role user blocked from /seller (redirected to /)
critical_code_review_comments: data-testid for grade pills uses raw size strings with spaces and special chars, e.g. data-testid="grade-filter-8 mm & Above". Selectors work but slugified ids would be more robust.
Products.js: searchQuery filter uses p.description.toLowerCase() without null-guard - if any future product has null description, will throw. Same for p.name and p.size.
ProtectedRoute pure-buyer fallback redirects to '/' instead of /dashboard - acceptable but inconsistent with seller/admin fallbacks which go to their own dashboards.
seed_data_creation: Created 3 approved test users (both/seller/buyer roles) via API + admin approval. No new products created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 features validated end-to-end. Products page filter pill testids are 'grade-filter-{exact size string}' (e.g. 'grade-filter-8 mm & Above'). Role-switch banner appears only when user.role === 'both'. ProtectedRoute correctly allows 'both' on /seller AND /dashboard. Test users for both/seller/buyer roles available in /tmp/test_users.txt.
